title: 皐月賞の後に・プリテンディング

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And the winner of the Satsuki Sho, the first of the
Classic Triple Crown, is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Gasp... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin! Narita Taishin has emerged
victorious!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ngh... My head hurts. Ugh... But still...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I won! Hah! I hope all my haters saw that! They'll
never say I'm not good enough ever again!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What happened in that race? And what is this
feeling?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Urk!)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(I still feel so overwhelmed by the intensity in her
voice!)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ticket, are you...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: What if this had been the Derby? I... I would've lost...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ticket?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Gaaah! This is no time to show weakness! I gotta
stay STRONG!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna be the Derby Champion! I WILL make it
happen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide returns to the waiting room with a
dark expression on her face.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Yes. I'm fine.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
This is all because I let myself become arrogant...
Or maybe it means there's a flaw in my equation.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And if that's the case, I simply need to find a way
to fix it. Everything will be fine. There has to be a
solution.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
This was but the result of a miscalculation and
nothing more.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
As long as I fix it, the equation should behave
predictably, and I won't have to worry about ever
losing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her voice keeps getting smaller and smaller until
she's nearly inaudible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whatever the miscalculation was, she seems
pretty shaken. She must have discovered
something worrying. Still...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ticket is tenacious and persists at full speed until
the very end... And the ferocity of Taishin's
pursuit is unparalleled.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Both of them are first-class competitors in their
own right. They're incredible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What could have happened in this race to make
them outliers in her calculations?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I might have lost, but at least I've obtained new
data.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Let's reanalyze things right away. There's not
much time left until the Derby, so we can't waste
any time...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next stop on our journey together is the
second race of the Classic Triple Crown tour—the
Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But hearing such urgency in her voice makes me
worry that something in her is beginning to crack.
